sections.paragraph: Ch. adj. i.q. Heb. קָדֹושׁ holy-(a) used of God, or any deities, אֱלָהִין קַדִּישִׁין the holy gods, Dan 4:5, 5:11 .-(b) of angels. Dan 4:10, עִיר וְקַדִּישׁ “a watcher (an angel) even a holy one.” Pl. קַדִּישִׁין holy ones, i.e. angels, Dan 4:14 (see קְדֹושִׁים No. 2, a).-(c) used of the Jews, Dan 7:21 fully קַדִּישֵׁי עֶלְיֹונִין those who are sacred to the Most High, Dan 7:18, 22 , 25 compare Esdr. 8:70 , τὸ σπέρμα τὸ ἅγιον.
